task_completion.description: Verify that a new contact for Rachel Torres was created with the correct details.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Odoo Contacts form or list view showing 'Rachel Torres' with Job Title 'VP Operations', Email 'rachel.torres@northbridge.org', Phone '+1-555-0275', and Company 'Northbridge Consulting'.

task_completion.description: Verify that Henry Kim was replaced by Rachel Torres in the 'Operations Daily Sync' recurring event.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the event details of 'Operations Daily Sync'. The attendees list must include 'Rachel Torres' and must NOT include 'Henry Kim'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the location of the 'Operations Daily Sync' event was changed to 'Virtual (Zoom)'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the event details of 'Operations Daily Sync'. The Location field should be set to 'Virtual (Zoom)'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the 'Quarterly Business Review' was rescheduled to exactly one week later.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the calendar view or event form for 'Quarterly Business Review' showing the date shifted exactly 7 days forward from its original date, maintaining the same time (09:00-12:00).

task_completion.description: Verify that the 'Quarterly Business Review' attendees and description were updated.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'Quarterly Business Review' event form. 'Henry Kim' must be removed from attendees, 'Rachel Torres' added, and the description must contain 'Q2 restructuring agenda: new reporting lines, updated departmental KPIs, and budget reallocation proposals.'

task_completion.description: Verify the creation of the new 'Operations Transition Check-in' event with correct time, attendees, and description.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a new event named 'Operations Transition Check-in'. The time should be 9:00-9:30 AM, location 'Operations Hub', attendees 'Rachel Torres' and 'Grace Patel', and description mentioning 'Bi-weekly transition check-in to track handover of operational responsibilities.'

task_completion.description: Verify the 'Operations Transition Check-in' event is set to recur on Mondays and Thursdays for 4 weeks, with a 30-minute email reminder.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the recurrence settings showing it repeats weekly on both 'Monday' and 'Thursday' for '4 weeks' (or 8 occurrences). Additionally, check the Reminders/Alarms section for a '30 minutes' 'Email' reminder.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use terminal commands (like curl or python scripts) to bypass the UI.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show interaction exclusively within the Odoo web interface in a browser, without terminal windows executing API calls.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the actual Odoo application.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should display the standard Odoo 17 Calendar and Contacts interface (e.g., purple header, standard Odoo form layouts) at localhost:8069.

integrity.description: Verify the UI does not appear to be manipulated via browser developer tools.
integrity.visual_evidence: Text, fonts, and layout should look consistent with the standard Odoo UI, without misaligned elements or artificially pasted text blocks.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires interacting with Odoo 17 Calendar and Contacts modules. 1. Contact Rachel Torres must be created from scratch (she does not exist initially). 2. 'Operations Daily Sync' is a recurring weekday event; the agent must modify ALL occurrences (historically difficult for agents). 3. 'Quarterly Business Review' starts ~3 weeks in the future; it must be moved exactly 7 days later (same day of week/time). 4. 'Operations Transition Check-in' is a completely new event that must be set to recur on both Monday AND Thursday for 4 weeks, with a 30-minute email reminder. Grace Patel is the CFO and an existing contact.
